query: Okay so I booked the SEA to JFK flight last week for the offsite, original it was economy, and now my manager say the meetings got moved a day earlier so I'm flying overnight and honestly I cannot sleep in those seats. My back already not great. So how about premium economy upgrade -- can I expense the fare difference, or is that something I pay myself?
wants: Whether the fare difference for a premium-economy upgrade on a long flight is reimbursable under travel policy.
label_note: Regional upgrade article answers directly: reimburses only LLF economy, employee pays the difference. No VN variant; Regional is applicable. PEA long-haul exception not applicable (SEA-JFK domestic transcon, not 14h+).

query: The booking tool gave me this banner "OUT OF POLICY - REQUIRES JUSTIFICATION" when I picked the hotel near the venue because it was like 40 dollar over the cap. I don't really get what justification means here, like do I just type a reason and it goes through, or does it get block until somebody approve it? Confused what step is mine.
wants: How the out-of-policy justification flow works when a hotel exceeds the nightly cap -- whether it auto-approves or needs manager sign-off.
label_note: Out-of-policy flag article explains the justification flow for out-of-policy selections like exceeding the hotel cap.

query: so about the hotel thing... my team going to the Austin event next month... not sure how this part work... can someone explain the hotel side of it...
wants: Unclear ask faintly anchored to hotel booking for an event -- possibly how to book, caps, or what's covered.
label_note: Vague but anchored to hotel booking; most plausible is the hotel accommodations allowed article. Partial because the specific sub-ask is unclear.

query: expense report submit deadline after trip end how many days
wants: The deadline (number of days after a trip) by which an expense report must be submitted.
label_note: Directly the expense submission deadline article (Global).

query: ugh i think i lost the taxi receipt from the airport ride. its like 35 bucks. what do i do for the expense if i dont have the paper one
wants: How to claim an expense (a ~$35 taxi) when the receipt is lost.
label_note: Lost receipt article (Global) directly answers what to do for a missing receipt.

query: so um yesterday the rental car i had it got a little fender bender in the parking garage nobody hurt but theres a scratch on the bumper and i already had to leave for my flight so um what am i supposed to do about reporting this and also do i need to like file something with the travel insurance or does the rental company handle it i need to know asap
wants: Two asks: (1) the procedure to report a rental-car accident, and (2) whether travel insurance must be involved or the rental company handles it.
label_note: Multi-intent: accident reporting procedure (report a car accident) + rental insurance coverage (CDW/LDW provided), one article per intent.

query: Quick question on approvals. Background: I'm a new hire, started six weeks ago, and this is my first business trip so I want to do it right and not annoy my manager with paperwork. The flight is a bit pricey because it's last minute. Does my manager have to approve the trip before I book it, or does the approval happen automatically inside the tool after?
wants: Whether manager approval must happen before booking a (pricey, last-minute) trip or is handled automatically by the tool afterward.
label_note: Manager approval article: approval not required for most bookings; directly answers the before/after question.

query: I accidentally used the "CORPORATE CARD" for a personal dinner -- saw it on the statement now. It wasn't travel, just me forgetting which card. What's the "personal use" remediation, do I reimburse the company directly or does it net against my next expense report?
wants: The correct way to fix an accidental personal charge on the corporate card -- direct repayment vs. netting against expenses.
label_note: Corporate card personal expense article (Global) directly covers repaying personal expenses.

query: hey the travel profile thing... it not letting me... i tried earlier and... idk something with the booking tool... how about you tell me what to check...
wants: Unclear problem faintly anchored to the travel profile / booking tool not working -- could be login, profile setup, or a tech-support issue.
label_note: Vague but anchored to travel profile setup; Regional travel-profile article is the closest (no VN variant). Partial because it could be a tech-support issue, not resolved.

query: meal per diem dinner limit domestic trip how much
wants: The per-meal (dinner) reimbursement limit / per diem for a domestic trip.
label_note: Meals article is the right topic but gives no specific dinner dollar number; punts to the Travel Reimbursement Guide, so the exact limit is not resolved -> partial.

query: im traveling to india for a vendor meeting and i never done a work visa before. do i request the visa through the travel team or is it on me to get it. dont want to mess this up and miss the trip
wants: Who handles obtaining a work/business visa for international travel -- the travel team or the employee.
label_note: Visa article: pre-travel immigration assessment / guided experience answers the who-handles-it question.

query: okay so i have the conference in london for three day for work but my sister live there so i thinking to stay extra four day after on my own dime and i was wondering how that combine trip work in the tool and also separate thing the miles i earn from this flight are those mine to keep or company keep them
wants: Two asks: (1) how to book a combined work+personal trip in the tool, and (2) whether airline miles earned on the work flight belong to the employee or the company.
label_note: Multi-intent: combine work+personal travel + personal miles/loyalty points ownership, one article per intent.

query: The booking tool keeps throwing an error when I try to add my Known Traveler Number -- saving spins then fails. Trip is tomorrow, asap. Who do I contact for tech support on the travel tool itself?
wants: The tech-support contact/channel for a booking-tool error (saving a Known Traveler Number fails).
label_note: Technical support for the Self-Service Travel Booking Tool article directly answers the tech-support contact.

wants: RSU vesting schedule and how to sell vested shares -- equity/stock topic, out of the travel-and-expense domain.
label_note: Equity/RSU stock topic, out of travel-and-expense domain. Nothing in corpus answers.

query: my expense for the client lunch got rejected... reason just say "see policy"... not helpful... three of us went... why it bounce and what i fix...
wants: Why a client-lunch expense was rejected and how to correct and resubmit it.
label_note: Expense report rejected article (Global) covers why it bounced and how to fix/resubmit.

wants: Unclear ask anchored to mobile-phone reimbursement (roaming/data while traveling) -- whether and how it's covered.
label_note: Mobile phone article explicitly covers international roaming (up to $150/mo incremental via Travel Related Incremental Mobile Fees), directly answering the roaming reimbursement intent.

query: so um i have a medical condition and i need to be able to like get up and walk during long flights and maybe a specific seat type and i was wondering um how do i request a medical accommodation for my work travel like is there a form or who do i talk to im a bit nervous about it
wants: How to request a medical accommodation (seating/movement needs) for business travel -- the process or contact.
label_note: Medical accommodation for travel article: contact Disability and Leave Services; directly answers the how/who.

query: Two things on the same trip if you don't mind. I'm planning the Tokyo trip and I'd like to tack on a personal weekend at the end -- can I book that whole personal portion inside the travel tool, or only the work part? And separately, is travel insurance something the company already provides for these trips, or do I arrange my own for the personal days?
wants: Two asks: (1) whether the personal portion of a trip can be booked inside the travel tool, and (2) whether the company provides travel insurance vs. arranging your own for personal days.
label_note: Multi-intent: cannot book personal travel in the tool (booking personal travel article) + company provides travel insurance (Do I need travel insurance), one per intent.

query: relocating to the austin office next quarter, need the "RELOCATION PACKAGE" details asap -- what moving costs covered and how to claim the temp housing
wants: Relocation package details (moving costs, temp housing) -- relocation topic, out of the travel-and-expense domain.
